requirement_topic.en: GRENLEC Grid Connection - 230/400 V, 50 Hz Supply
requirement_topic.zh: GRENLEC并网接入——230/400 V、50 Hz供电
requirement_topic.zht: GRENLEC併網接入——230/400 V、50 Hz供電

summary.en: Grenada's public electricity supply is operated by Grenada Electricity Services Ltd. (GRENLEC) under the supervision of the Public Utilities Regulatory Commission (PURC). The practical low-voltage design basis for EV charger projects is 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Grid-connected charger installations should be reviewed with GRENLEC for service capacity, metering, protection coordination, earthing, load management, power quality, commissioning, and any project-specific connection approval. Solar and distributed-energy policy activity in Grenada can create interest in managed charging and load control, but it does not remove utility review for new high-load EVSE installations.
summary.zh: 格林纳达公共电力供应由Grenada Electricity Services Ltd.（GRENLEC）运营，并受公共事业监管委员会（PURC）监督。电动汽车充电桩项目的实务低压设计基准为230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。并网充电桩安装应与GRENLEC审查供电容量、计量、保护配合、接地、负载管理、电能质量、调试及任何项目特定接入批准。格林纳达的太阳能和分布式能源政策活动可能带来对有序充电和负载控制的需求，但不会免除新增大负荷EVSE安装的公用事业审查。
summary.zht: 格瑞那達公共電力供應由Grenada Electricity Services Ltd.（GRENLEC）運營，並受公共事業監管委員會（PURC）監督。電動汽車充電樁項目的實務低壓設計基準為230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。併網充電樁安裝應與GRENLEC審查供電容量、計量、保護配合、接地、負載管理、電能質量、調試及任何項目特定接入批准。格瑞那達的太陽能和分布式能源政策活動可能帶來對有序充電和負載控制的需求，但不會免除新增大負荷EVSE安裝的公用事業審查。

standards_or_laws: GRENLEC electricity supply and service-connection requirements
Public Utilities Regulatory Commission (PURC) utility regulation for Grenada
IEC 61000 series - electromagnetic compatibility and power quality

summary.en: China domestic EV charger installations are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Grenada has the same nominal frequency but a different nominal voltage at 230/400 V, so voltage range, protection thresholds, metering accuracy, thermal behaviour, and power-quality evidence must be confirmed for Grenada rather than assumed from China domestic evidence.
summary.zh: 中国国内电动汽车充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930-2023及当地电网运营商验收形成文件。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。格林纳达标称频率相同，但标称电压为230/400 V，与中国不同，因此电压范围、保护阈值、计量精度、热表现和电能质量证据必须按格林纳达条件确认，不能直接从中国国内证据推定。
summary.zht: 中國國內電動汽車充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023及當地電網運營商驗收形成文件。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。格瑞那達標稱頻率相同，但標稱電壓為230/400 V，與中國不同，因此電壓範圍、保護閾值、計量精度、熱表現和電能質量證據必須按格瑞那達條件確認，不能直接從中國國內證據推定。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm input-voltage range for 230/400 V at 50 Hz, protective-device settings, neutral and earthing assumptions, metering compatibility, harmonic and flicker performance, load-management functions, and the GRENLEC service-capacity review for the installation site. A China 220/380 V, 50 Hz design is not automatically Grenada-ready because the frequency matches but the voltage differs.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认230/400 V、50 Hz输入电压范围、保护器件设定、中性线和接地假设、计量兼容性、谐波和闪变表现、负载管理功能，以及安装场址的GRENLEC供电容量审查。中国220/380 V、50 Hz设计不能自动视为适用于格林纳达，因为频率相同但电压不同。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認230/400 V、50 Hz輸入電壓範圍、保護器件設定、中性線和接地假設、計量兼容性、諧波和閃變表現、負載管理功能，以及安裝場址的GRENLEC供電容量審查。中國220/380 V、50 Hz設計不能自動視為適用於格瑞那達，因為頻率相同但電壓不同。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected installations where GRENLEC service connection, metering, protection, and commissioning approval are required; exact project route should be confirmed with GRENLEC and PURC where relevant
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid-operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a GRENLEC approval substitute; 220/380 V evidence must be checked against Grenada 230/400 V conditions

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Grenada uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the nominal voltage differs at 230/400 V versus 220/380 V. Confirm input range, protection, metering, power quality, and GRENLEC site acceptance before shipment or installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 格林纳达与中国同为50 Hz，但标称电压为230/400 V，与中国220/380 V不同。出货或安装前应确认输入范围、保护、计量、电能质量和GRENLEC场站验收。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 格瑞那達與中國同為50 Hz，但標稱電壓為230/400 V，與中國220/380 V不同。出貨或安裝前應確認輸入範圍、保護、計量、電能質量和GRENLEC場站驗收。
